hero.headline: Wear What the Icons Wear.
hero.subheadline: Rolex. Cartier. Audemars Piguet. Patek Philippe. Curated, inspected, and delivered from Montreal to your wrist — with a 30-day guarantee.

why.headline: Montreal's Most Trusted Name in Luxury Watches.
why.subheadline: We don't just sell timepieces. We curate experiences. Every watch that leaves our atelier has been hand-selected, carefully inspected, and prepared with the same attention to detail you'd expect from a premium specialist.
why.p1Body: We work exclusively with Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe. No mass inventory. Every timepiece is chosen for its design, condition, and desirability.
why.p2Body: Every watch undergoes a thorough inspection before it reaches you. We check case integrity, crystal clarity, bracelet tension, and overall cosmetic finish. Every piece meets our quality standard before shipment.
why.p3Body: We're not a faceless online store. We're a Montreal-based team of watch enthusiasts who believe luxury should feel personal. You can message us, call us, or visit us.
why.p4Body: If your watch doesn't meet your expectations for any reason, send it back within 30 days for a full refund. No restocking fees. No questions. We stand behind every piece.
why.p5Body: No bots. No automated emails. Message us on WhatsApp and get a response from a real member of our team — usually within minutes.
why.p6Body: Every order comes with a bracelet adjustment tool, premium packaging, tracked shipping, and optional box & papers upgrade. No hidden costs, no surprises.

range.headline: Two Collections. One Standard of Excellence.
range.subheadline: Whether you're starting your collection or upgrading to grail status, Artemis has you covered.
range.essentialBody: The Essential Range is for the man who wants the look, the weight, and the presence of a luxury timepiece — without the five-figure price tag. Carefully selected for design accuracy, wrist feel, and visual impact.
range.premiumTagline: For those who demand the best.
range.premiumBody: The Premium Range is our highest tier. Superior materials, enhanced finishing, more intricate detailing, and a wrist presence that commands attention. Built for collectors, connoisseurs, and those who refuse to compromise.

bestSellers.headline: Best Sellers This Month
bestSellers.subheadline: The pieces our clients can't stop buying. Updated monthly.

testimonials.headline: Trusted by Watch Lovers Across Canada

reviews.text: I was skeptical buying a luxury watch online, but Artemis changed my mind. The Submariner arrived in perfect condition, beautifully packaged, and the WhatsApp support was incredible.
reviews.author: Marc D.

reviews.text: Ordered the Datejust for my husband's birthday. The presentation was absolutely gorgeous — he was completely blown away. The packaging and quality exceeded every expectation. The 30-day guarantee gave me total peace of mind.
reviews.author: Sarah L.

reviews.text: Best purchase I've made this year. The Royal Oak from the Premium range has an incredible wrist presence. Fast shipping, great communication.
reviews.author: James K.

reviews.text: As a watch collector, I'm picky. Artemis impressed me with their attention to detail and honest descriptions. The Santos I received was exactly as shown.
reviews.author: David R.

signup.microcopy: No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. Your discount code is delivered instantly.
signup.trust: Trusted by clients across Canada & internationally

faq.headline: Common Questions
faq.a1: Canadian orders typically 3-7 business days. International 7-14 business days. All orders include tracked shipping.
faq.a2: Yes. Canada and most international destinations. Costs calculated at checkout.
faq.a3: 30-day money-back guarantee. Return in original condition for full refund. No restocking fees.
faq.q4: Can I talk to someone before buying?
faq.a4: Absolutely. WhatsApp us at 514-560-9765. Real team member, usually within minutes.
faq.q5: Is a bracelet adjustment tool included?
faq.a5: Yes. Every order includes a professional bracelet adjustment tool at no extra cost.
faq.a6: Create an account and your unique 10% code is sent instantly. Valid on any timepiece, any range.

reviewsPage.metaDescription: Read what our clients say about ARTEMIS. 200+ satisfied clients across Canada. 4.9/5 average rating.
reviewsPage.headline: What Our Clients Say.
reviewsPage.heroBody: Real orders. Real clients. Real results. See what our community says about the ARTEMIS experience — from unboxing to wearing.
reviewsPage.ugcCaption: Tag @artemis.watches on Instagram or Snapchat. The best shots get featured right here.

faqPage.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about ARTEMIS. Shipping, returns, product quality, payments, and more.
faqPage.heroBody: Everything you need to know about ordering, shipping, returns, and quality. Can't find your answer? We're one message away.
faqPage.stillHaveQBody: Our team responds on WhatsApp within minutes during business hours. No bots. No ticket queues. Just real answers from real people.
faqPage.s1a1: Canadian orders typically arrive in 3–7 business days via tracked courier. International orders take 7–14 business days. All orders include a tracking number sent to your email upon dispatch.
faqPage.s1a2: Yes. We ship to most countries worldwide. International shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on destination. Some restrictions may apply — contact us on WhatsApp if you are unsure.
faqPage.s1a3: Free shipping is available on all Canadian orders. International shipping costs vary by destination and are shown at checkout.
faqPage.s1a4: Absolutely. Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a tracking number by email. You can track your shipment in real-time through the courier's website.
faqPage.s1a5: Every watch is packaged with care in a secure, discreet box with protective padding. Presentation is premium — nothing visually identifies the contents from the outside for security reasons.
faqPage.s2a1: If your watch does not meet your expectations for any reason — condition, aesthetics, anything — you can return it within 30 days of receipt for a full refund. No restocking fees. No questions asked.
faqPage.s2q2: How do I initiate a return?
faqPage.s2a2: Simply contact us on WhatsApp or by email at hello@artemis-watches.com within 30 days of receiving your order. We will send you a prepaid return label and process your refund within 5–7 business days.
faqPage.s2q3: In what condition should I return the watch?
faqPage.s2a3: The watch should be returned in the same condition as received — unworn or worn only for inspection — with all original packaging included.
faqPage.s2q4: How long does a refund take?
faqPage.s2a4: Once we receive and inspect the returned watch, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days. The amount will appear on your original payment method.
faqPage.s3a1: Every watch is individually inspected by our team before listing and again before shipment. We check case integrity, crystal clarity, bracelet tension, crown function, and overall cosmetic finish. Only pieces that meet our standard are offered for sale.
faqPage.s3a2: We carry four of the most iconic watch designs in the world: Rolex (Submariner, Datejust, GMT-Master II, Daytona), Cartier (Santos de Cartier, Panthère de Cartier), Audemars Piguet (Royal Oak), and Patek Philippe (Nautilus, Aquanaut).
faqPage.s3q3: What is the difference between Essential and Premium ranges?
faqPage.s3a3: The Essential Range ($300–$350 CAD) offers iconic designs at an accessible entry point. The Premium Range ($900–$1,600 CAD) features superior finishing, materials, and wrist presence. Both ranges are held to the same quality inspection standard.
faqPage.s3q4: Do the watches come with box and papers?
faqPage.s3a4: A box & papers accessory set is available as an optional add-on for $49 CAD at checkout on eligible pieces.
faqPage.s3q5: What is included with every order?
faqPage.s3a5: Every ARTEMIS order includes: the watch, a professional bracelet adjustment tool, premium protective packaging, and tracked shipping with signature confirmation.
faqPage.s3q6: Can I see the watch in person before buying?
faqPage.s3a6: Yes. Montreal-based clients can arrange a private in-person viewing. Contact us on WhatsApp at 514-560-9765 to schedule an appointment.
faqPage.s4q1: What payment methods do you accept?
faqPage.s4a1: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other methods available through our Stripe checkout. All payments are processed securely.
faqPage.s4a2: Yes. All payments are processed through Stripe, one of the world's most trusted payment processors. ARTEMIS never stores your credit card information.
faqPage.s4a3: Installment options (4x payments) are available at checkout through eligible payment methods. The option will appear automatically if your order and payment method qualify.
faqPage.s4a4: PayPal is not currently available at checkout, but you can pay securely with Visa, Mastercard, or any card supported by Stripe.
faqPage.s5a1: Create an account at artemis-watches.com and your unique 10% promo code is sent to you instantly by email. Valid on any timepiece in any range — no minimum. One-time use.
faqPage.s5q2: Can I use my promo code more than once?
faqPage.s5a2: No. Each promo code is unique and valid for one order only. Once used, it expires automatically.
faqPage.s5q3: I created an account but did not receive my promo code — what do I do?
faqPage.s5a3: Check your spam or junk folder first. If the code is not there within a few minutes, contact us at hello@artemis-watches.com or on WhatsApp.
faqPage.s5q4: Can I combine my promo code with other offers?
faqPage.s5a4: Promo codes cannot be combined with other active promotions. They apply to the product price before shipping.

about.metaDescription: Montreal's premier luxury watch destination. Learn how ARTEMIS was born from a passion for horological excellence and an obsession with quality.
about.heroBody: ARTEMIS was founded by watch enthusiasts who believed in one thing: that access to exceptional design should not require a five-figure budget. We set out to build something different — a curated boutique that treats every client like a collector and every timepiece with the respect it deserves.
about.storyP1: Every watch that leaves our atelier has been hand-selected, carefully inspected, and prepared with the same attention to detail you would expect from a premium specialist. We believe in the object, its design, and what it means to the person wearing it.
about.storyP2: That is why we limit ourselves to four Maisons — Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, Patek Philippe — and why we refuse to compromise on condition or provenance. When you buy from ARTEMIS, you are not buying a product. You are acquiring a piece of horological history.
about.storyQuote: A watch is more than an instrument of time. It is a statement of who you are, and where you are going.
about.v1Body: We work exclusively with Rolex, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe. No mass inventory. Every timepiece is personally selected for its design integrity, condition, and desirability.
about.v2Body: Every watch undergoes a rigorous multi-point inspection before it leaves our hands. Case integrity, crystal clarity, bracelet tension — nothing leaves us unless it meets our quality standard.
about.v3Body: We are not a faceless warehouse. We are a Montreal-based team of collectors and enthusiasts who believe luxury should feel personal. Message us, call us, meet us.
about.v4Body: If your watch does not meet your expectations for any reason, return it within 30 days for a full refund. No restocking fees. No questions. We stand behind every piece we sell.
about.montrealBody: We are proud to be a Montreal-first brand. Every order is packaged and shipped from our atelier in Québec. Local clients can arrange a private viewing. Shipping is available across Canada and internationally with full tracking on every order.
about.ctaReadyLabel: Ready to find your next timepiece?

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with ARTEMIS. WhatsApp, email, or in-person viewing in Montreal. Fast replies guaranteed.
contact.subheadline: No chatbots. No ticket queues. Our team responds on WhatsApp within minutes — or by email within 24 hours. We are based in Montréal and happy to arrange private viewings.
contact.formBody: Use this form for general inquiries, product questions, or to request a private viewing in Montréal. For the fastest response, WhatsApp is always best.
contact.basedInValue: Montréal, Québec, Canada · Shipping across Canada & worldwide
